QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: National Pension System (NPS)_20

question.text: If a subscriber does not make any investment choice at the time of joining NPS, which option is applied by default?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** If no investment choice is made, the default is Auto Choice LC-50 (Moderate lifecycle fund). **The Trap:** Some candidates assume the default is the most conservative option (LC-25) or Active Choice. It is actually LC-50 (Moderate). **Cross-Exam Context:** Default LC-50 provides a balanced starting point: 50% equity till age 35, gradually reducing to 10% by age 55+. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Always encourage clients to make an active choice rather than relying on the default. Review their risk profile before suggesting Active or Auto.
